org.apache.dubbo.metadata.store.etcd

类 EtcdMetadataReportFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.metadata.report.support.AbstractMetadataReportFactory
      • org.apache.dubbo.metadata.store.etcd.EtcdMetadataReportFactory
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    MetadataReportFactory

    public class EtcdMetadataReportFactory
extends AbstractMetadataReportFactory
    MetadataReportFactory to create an Etcd based MetadataReport.
